hooks.command: FILE=$(node -e "try{const d=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||'{}');console.log(d.file_path||'')}catch(e){}" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then echo '--- TypeScript: a verificar tipos ---'; cd "/c/Users/Administrator/Documents/antigravity folder/yentelelo-requisicoes" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -40; fi
